On Fri, Jul 14, 2000 at 07:20:14AM -0700, Cy.Schubert@uumail.gov.bc.ca wrote:
> >Synopsis:       New mhash port required by new aide port

[..snip..]

> Required patches to the mhash port to support the new aide port.

Nick, this aide port has been in our PR system for a long time and I'm
not going to wait long for you to update this port.

Could you do the honors, or shall I?

--
